title: Not Logistics Pipes
body:
![modrinth badge](https://badge.bernasss12.dev/modrinth/notlogisticspipes/name?) ![modrinth downloads badge](https://badge.bernasss12.dev/modrinth/notlogisticspipes/downloads)

Not Logistics Pipes provides one pipe to accomplish ~~basic~~ and ~~advanced~~ logistics tasks. Similar to ~~Logistics Pipes~~ (other mods), it allows distributing items via pipes, ~~organised stockkeeping~~ ~~and easier automated crafting~~.

Disclaimer: Please mind that this mod is currently extremely bare and was released for testing purposes. Very basic functionality has been implemented as the groundwork for extensions that will provide a proper logistics system. Please get in touch, if you would like to take an active role in this.

If you're on Matrix rather than Discord, join us here: [#notlogisticspipes:rs485.network](https://matrix.to/#/#notlogisticspipes:rs485.network)
